slider-1-title:
Make safety a priority.
Each employee, their PPE
slider-1-description: We offer a wide range of personal protective equipment tailored to different needs and budgets. As a distributor of well-known brands for their quality, we provide reliable and high-performance solutions to ensure the safety of your teams on a daily basis. Some models can also be customized (embroidery & flocking) according to your requests.
slider-2-description: With ISD, you get much more than quality products; you enjoy a complete and personalized experience that supports your success in delivering exceptional healthcare. Our dedicated team is here to assist you every step of the way, offering expert advice, prompt assistance, and unparalleled customer service. Trust ISD to be your trusted partner in the medical field.
slider-3-title: A serious and reliable partner for your Purchases
slider-3-description: Explore new opportunities for efficiency and savings with our specialized purchasing center. Our procurement expertise, combined with strong partnerships with trusted suppliers, allows us to offer you optimized purchasing solutions that meet your specific needs. Trust our dedicated team to help you navigate the complex landscape of purchasing and maximize the value of every transaction.
location-pn: Boulevard de Loango, opposite BI TOTAL, next to Louise-Michel clinic

services-consumables-description: your needs for consumables and reagents, find satisfaction with us.
services-equipment-description: We offer fast and efficient distribution of various personal protective equipment.
services-inventory-description: what do your teams need to perform in their activity? we can help you !
medical-1: Installation of an MRI, a Canon 80-bar scanner
medical-3: Installation of a remote control table

isd-medik-description: ISD is a major player in the medical field in Congo, with a wide range of medical equipment and consumables. We are committed to providing high-quality products and services to meet the needs of healthcare professionals and institutions in Congo. Our team of experts is dedicated to ensuring that our customers receive the best solutions for their medical needs, whether it's for hospitals, clinics, or other healthcare facilities.
isd-epi: ISD in the field of PPE
isd-epi-description: ISD is a leading provider of personal protective equipment (PPE) in Congo, offering a wide range of high-quality products to ensure the safety and well-being of individuals in various industries. We are committed to providing reliable and effective PPE solutions to meet the needs of our customers, whether it's for healthcare workers, industrial workers, or anyone in need of protective gear. Our team is dedicated to delivering exceptional service and support to ensure that our customers have access to the best PPE products available.
isd-achat: ISD in the field of purchasing
isd-achat-description: ISD is a trusted partner in the field of purchasing, offering comprehensive procurement solutions to meet the diverse needs of our clients. We specialize in sourcing and supplying a wide range of products and services, ensuring that our customers have access to high-quality goods at competitive prices. Our team of procurement experts is dedicated to providing efficient and effective purchasing services, helping our clients streamline their procurement processes and achieve their business goals.
v1-description: Our mission is to protect life by supporting the daily work of healthcare professionals .
v2-description: Total transparency about origins and compliance of our products, the base of our relationship.
v3-description: We guarantee certified equipment that complies with the strictest safety standards.
v4-description: We select the most advanced technologies to offer high-performance solutions.
us-description:
Congolese company created in 2007. We are represented in the two largest cities of Congo with an agency in Brazzaville as well as an agency in Pointe-Noire

our company focuses on three departments: the medical department, the PPE department and the purchasing department, all three focused on quality and innovation to guarantee the satisfaction of our customers.
